positive: A minimalist, stylized depiction of a mountain landscape at sunrise. The composition features sweeping, abstract layers of stylized peaks and valleys, rendered in a clean, geometric silhouette style. Use a limited color palette of deep indigo, warm copper, and soft cream. The focus is on strong contrast and clean edges, suitable for screen printing on apparel. The sunrise is represented by radiating, abstract lines and soft gradients behind the mountains, giving a sense of depth without detail. Vector art quality, highly detailed, highly saturated, graphic design poster.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, low quality, noise, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poor composition, graffiti, photorealism
